summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Judo Klub Izola website. All core functionality working perfectly including navigation, gallery lightbox, mobile menu, and CTA buttons.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, Andrea Leški news, and club logos
Navigation works between all 4 pages (Domov, O nas, Galerija, Kontakt)
Gallery lightbox opens and closes correctly
Mobile menu opens and closes properly
Mobile navigation to all pages works
Footer links to all pages work correctly
Hero CTA buttons navigate to correct pages
News section CTA to gallery works
All pages display correct Slovenian content
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Website is responsive on mobile and desktop
